description_long: This is a whimsical ice cream shop with a pastel color palette, featuring a large, multicolored soft-serve ice cream cone sculpture on its flat roof, making it highly recognizable from a distance. The building has a retro diner aesthetic, with turquoise and pink accents, large glass windows at the front, and a pink roof trim. Two red-and-white striped umbrellas shade outdoor seating areas in front of the shop, each with tables and chairs, inviting customers to sit and enjoy their treats. The shop is surrounded by a small patch of green lawn with neatly spaced bushes, and a paved walkway leads up to the entrance. The rear of the building is more utilitarian, with a service door and rooftop HVAC unit visible. The overall design is playful and inviting, clearly signaling its function as a destination for ice cream lovers.
description: A playful, pastel-colored ice cream shop with a giant soft-serve cone sculpture on the roof, large front windows, and outdoor seating shaded by striped umbrellas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and two umbrella-shaded outdoor seating areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large ice cream sculpture, side windows, and one umbrella with seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a service door, rooftop HVAC unit, and no windows or seating.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with prominent ice cream sculpture, side windows, and umbrella seating visible.
attribute_displayed_ice_cream_imagery: A large, sculpted, multicolored soft-serve ice cream cone is prominently displayed on the roof as a 3D model.
attribute_service_window_or_counter: A main service counter is implied at the front, behind the large glass windows, but no explicit service window is visible.
attribute_outdoor_seating: Two sets of outdoor tables and chairs are present, each shaded by a red-and-white striped umbrella, located directly in front of the shop.
attribute_architectural_style: Retro diner style with playful, pastel colors and bold decorative elements.
